transformations.name: Kaioken
transformations.description: A technique that multiplies the user's power for a limited time.

transformations.name: Great Ape
transformations.description: A transformation that Saiyans undergo upon looking at the full moon.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan 1
transformations.description: The first level of Super Saiyan transformation, enhancing strength and speed.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan 2
transformations.description: An advanced form of Super Saiyan with greater power and speed.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan 3
transformations.description: A transformation with long hair that greatly increases power but drains energy quickly.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan 4
transformations.description: A form that combines Saiyan power with the primal fury of an ape.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan God
transformations.description: A transformation that grants divine power to a Saiyan.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan Blue
transformations.description: Also known as Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan, it combines Super Saiyan God power with Super Saiyan form.

transformations.name: Ultra Instinct
transformations.description: A state of heightened reflexes and instinctual fighting, transcending standard transformations.

transformations.name: Beast
transformations.description: A powerful transformation that Gohan achieves, showcasing immense rage and power.

transformations.name: Spirit Bomb
transformations.description: A powerful attack created from energy gathered from living beings.

transformations.name: Fusion
transformations.description: A technique that merges two characters into one, combining their powers and abilities.

transformations.name: Vegito
transformations.description: A fusion of Goku and Vegeta, featuring immense strength and abilities.

transformations.name: Gogeta
transformations.description: Another fusion form of Goku and Vegeta, known for his speed and strength.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan Rose
transformations.description: A transformation unique to Goku Black, exhibiting divine energy and power.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan Blue Evolution
transformations.description: An advanced form of Super Saiyan Blue with even greater power.

transformations.name: Mystic Gohan
transformations.description: Gohan's ultimate form, unlocking his latent potential without transformation.

transformations.name: Golden Frieza
transformations.description: Frieza's transformation that grants him immense power and speed.
